untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking securities by returns over 3-12 month lookback period and selecting top performers (momentum cross-sectional comparison). Available indicators only support single-security technical analysis, not relative performance ranking across a universe of securities. The signal is fundamentally a relative value/ranking strategy that cannot be expressed using point-in-time technical indicator thresholds.
translation_notes: This is a cross-sectional momentum factor strategy that requires universe ranking and selection (buy past winners relative to peers), not technical indicators. Standard backtesting would require portfolio-level selection logic, not entry/exit rules on a single security's indicators. The 3-12 month parameter range is approximate; actual implementation would need discrete lookback and holding periods.
